claim: Remote MCP servers enable production-grade AI agent connections to external tools at scale, moving beyond localhost development patterns
actionable: Deploy MCP servers to Cloudflare Workers with authentication and monitoring instead of running on local machines to enable real production usage
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Streamable HTTP is the new MCP transport protocol enabling real-time streaming responses instead of legacy SSE endpoints
actionable: Use the new streamable HTTP transport in MCP server configuration for better scalability and lower latency than SSE
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: MCP security checklist from Anthropic documentation provides essential best practices for production MCP deployments including resource lifecycle management
actionable: Reference Anthropic's MCP security checklist when designing MCP servers and use it as a prompt for AI coding assistants to enforce security patterns
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: GitHub OAuth authentication for MCP tools enables role-based access control, protecting sensitive operations like database writes from unauthorized users
actionable: Implement GitHub OAuth in MCP servers using Cloudflare's provider and maintain allow-lists of GitHub users for access-controlled tools
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Tool descriptions in MCP servers are used directly in LLM prompts to determine when and how agents should use each tool, making clear descriptions critical
actionable: Write detailed, clear tool descriptions explaining the purpose, parameters, and use cases for each MCP tool to improve agent decision-making
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Lifespan management in MCP servers ensures graceful database connection closure and prevents memory leaks when the server exits
actionable: Use server lifespan hooks to initialize database connections on startup and close them properly on shutdown to avoid resource leaks
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: SQL query validation in MCP database tools prevents injection attacks by detecting dangerous SQL patterns before execution
actionable: Implement pattern matching to identify dangerous SQL keywords and operators, fail tool calls that violate safety rules before database execution
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Sentry integration provides production monitoring for MCP servers by capturing traces, errors, and performance metrics across all tool invocations
actionable: Add Sentry monitoring to production MCP deployments by wrapping the OOTH provider with Sentry.withEntry() and setting up error handlers
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Cloudflare Workers KV namespace provides a mini-database for managing OAuth state and authenticated session tracking across MCP deployments
actionable: Create a Cloudflare KV namespace named 'auth_kv' during production setup and reference it in wrangler.json to persist OAuth session data
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)

claim: Using AI coding assistants to build MCP servers requires providing context engineering: security checklist, existing codebase, and best practices templates
actionable: When prompting AI coding assistants to build MCP servers, copy the Anthropic security checklist into the prompt and reference template implementations
source_title: Build and Ship Any MCP Server in MINUTES (Full Guide)
